official_functions.function_or_member: ClientboundMoveEntityPacket.PosRot(int, short, short, short, byte, byte, boolean)
official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound move_entity_pos_rot packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official move_entity_pos_rot body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns move_entity_pos_rot to packet id 0x36.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the move_entity_pos_rot id to ClientboundMoveEntityPacket.PosRot.
The official move_entity_pos_rot body is entity id VarInt, three signed short deltas, yRot byte, xRot byte, and one boolean onGround.
The fixture uses primitive fields and does not require initialized Entity, Level, or game state.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer entity existence, movement interpolation semantics, initialized Level state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
